jd:
Your Mission




We’re looking for a Performance Marketing Manager who wants to do more than just run campaigns — someone who’s excited to directly shape how companies source and manufacture parts through MakerVerse. In this role, you’ll own our digital acquisition engine end-to-end, turning high-intent B2B demand into real business impact. From the first search to the final order, you’ll optimize every step of the funnel across Search, PMax, and Display — driving qualified leads and revenue for our Account Executives.




Your Impact




Drive Growth: Execute and optimize paid media campaigns to accelerate customer acquisition and order entry on makerverse.com.
Funnel Optimization: Collaborate with the Platform team to ensure web events are correctly tracked in Mixpanel and HubSpot, enabling a seamless data flow.
Sales Enablement: Work closely with the Sales team to ensure campaigns target the right industries (e.g. Aerospace, MedTech) and attract high-value decision-makers.
Conversion Optimization: Build and optimize landing pages in Unbounce and WordPress to maximize conversion rates from paid traffic.
Paid Search Focus: Continuously improve campaign structure, targeting, and performance across Search, PMax, and Display to capture high-intent demand.
Collaboration: Maintain a strong feedback loop across teams, sharing insights to continuously improve performance.







Your DNA




Solid hands-on experience managing Google Ads campaigns (Search, PMax, Display), including setup, optimization, and performance ownership. You have worked independently on campaigns and are confident managing them end-to-end.
You are comfortable working with data and deriving actionable insights. Experience with GA4 and/or Mixpanel is a strong plus.
Familiarity with tools like GTM, HubSpot, or Unbounce to support tracking, campaign setup, and landing page optimization.
You understand how marketing contributes to pipeline and enjoy collaborating with Sales to improve lead quality and conversion.
Hands-on experience with A/B testing and a strong drive to continuously improve CPA, conversion rates, and overall performance.
Professional English required. German is a strong plus given our core market.







Join Us & Raise the Bar




At MakerVerse, we don’t just execute — we innovate. We don’t just meet expectations — we exceed them. If you’re ready to take ownership, tackle meaningful challenges, and grow as part of a strong team, we’d love to hear from you.




Our team lives by these principles:




We Own It. We Deliver It. – We take responsibility, act with purpose, and go the extra mile to create impact.
We Execute Relentlessly. We Solve Big Challenges. – We embrace a “Doer” mindset & focus on solutions, not problems.
Our Customers’ Success = Our Success. – We solve for impact & prioritize what drives customer success.
We Win Together. We Set the Bar High. – We challenge and support each other to achieve our best and succeed as a high-performance team.




Curious about our Employee Benefits? Find out more at www.makerverse.com/careers.
title: Performance Marketing Manager (all genders welcome)

cv_parsed.name: Boru Lai
cv_parsed.summary: Data-driven marketing analytics professional with 4+ years of international experience across e-commerce, manufacturing, shipping, FinTech, and IoT. Skilled in data analysis, reporting, and customer insights. Experienced in turning complex datasets into actionable recommendations and supporting digital transformation. Seeking roles in marketing or data analytics to leverage analytical skills and business acumen for strategic impact.

experience.title: Working Student in Business Development
bullets: Market Segmentation & Intelligence: Conducted competitive analysis and market sizing across automotive and furniture retail segments; built structured benchmarking frameworks translating market data into opportunity scoring for strategic planning.
Insight Delivery: Packaged analytical findings into executive-ready reports influencing channel prioritisation and business development pipeline decisions.

experience.title: Working Student in Project Coordination Customer Experience
bullets: Funnel & Behavioural Analysis: Analysed booking-related customer journey and user research data to identify friction points and drop-off patterns; translated findings into structured performance summaries that directly influenced product backlog prioritisation.
Data Quality & Agile Delivery: Tracked data artefacts across agile sprints, ensured measurement consistency, and QA'd reporting outputs before executive sprint reviews.

experience.company: Hongkong and Shanghai Banking Corporation Limited (HSBC)
experience.title: Strategy Project Management Officer (PMO)
bullets: Programme Analytics & Attribution: Owned financial performance analytics for a USD 8M digital transformation programme; built multi-dimensional budget variance dashboards, tracked spend attribution across 6 workstreams, and produced weekly burn-rate reports escalated to C-suite.

Stakeholder Data Storytelling: Acted as bridge between technical data teams and C-level decision-makers — translated complex programme status into structured insight narratives that drove investment and prioritisation decisions at executive reviews.

experience.title: Marketing Manager
bullets: Campaign Analytics & ROI Measurement: Tracked and reported marketing performance KPIs across 4 B2B product launch campaigns; ROI analysis evidenced direct event-to-revenue impact of 4.6M CNY in signed contracts.

Funnel Optimisation & Lead Analytics: Analysed lead capture and pipeline conversion data from trade fair activations; identified drop-off stages and recommended targeting adjustments that improved qualified lead rate.
Competitive Intelligence: Built recurring competitor monitoring reports covering pricing, positioning, and channel activity; delivered strategic insights informing product go-to-market adjustments.
Segmentation & Channel Strategy: Developed customer segmentation models to differentiate messaging across B2B verticals; supported channel selection decisions with data-driven audience analysis.

experience.title: Product Marketing Manager
bullets: Portfolio Gap & Market Analysis: Identified product portfolio gaps across 6 lines through structured customer needs analysis and competitor benchmarking; findings directly shaped engineering development priorities and roadmap planning.

Sales Funnel & Conversion Tracking: Analysed trade fair lead pipelines and pre-sales conversion data for 100+ B2B client interactions; built performance summaries that optimised sales team targeting and follow-up sequencing.
Multi-market Campaign Performance: Monitored marketing performance across EMEA and APAC markets; translated channel and audience data into actionable recommendations for campaign spend allocation.

experience.title: Marketing & Project Coordinator
bullets: E-commerce Funnel & Audience Analytics: Analysed user behaviour, audience engagement, and conversion data across live-stream e-commerce events for 4,000+ attendees; produced post-event performance reports covering funnel drop-off, retention signals, and revenue attribution.

KOL Performance Tracking: Measured and reported KOL campaign effectiveness — tracking reach, engagement rate, and audience cohort behaviour across digital and live-event channels to optimise influencer spend allocation.

Insight-to-Action Reporting: Delivered structured analytical reports to senior management with data-backed recommendations that demonstrably improved targeting and format decisions for subsequent campaigns.
KPI Design: Developed an impact measurement framework and cost-benefit tracking methodology for sustainability projects, presenting findings and recommendations to club management.
Data-Driven Post-Event Evaluation: Delivered structured analysis that enabled evidence-based post-event evaluation across the club's sustainability programme.

education.degree: Master of Public Relations and Advertising

tools: Power BI (Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate PL-300)
certifications: Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate (PL-300)
